newQuiz.stem: Hardly ___ the bus when it began to pour with rain.
newQuiz.explanation: Hardly...when 句型表『一...就...』,Hardly 置句首須倒裝,且主句用過去完成式,故 had I gotten off。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 否定副詞 Hardly 置句首必須倒裝(助動詞提前),且 Hardly...when 搭配過去完成 had + p.p.;不可寫成 I had(未倒裝)或 did I get(時態錯)。

newQuiz.stem: No sooner ___ the door than the phone rang loudly.
newQuiz.explanation: No sooner...than 與 Hardly...when 同義,置句首倒裝且用過去完成式,故 had I closed。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ No sooner 後接 than(不是 when),且句首倒裝用過去完成 had I closed;常見錯誤是不倒裝(I had)或誤用 when。

newQuiz.stem: If I ___ about the traffic jam earlier, I would have taken another route.
newQuiz.explanation: 主句為 would have taken(與過去事實相反),屬第三類條件句,If 子句用過去完成式 had known。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 主句 would have + p.p. 是與『過去』事實相反,if 子句必須用過去完成 had known;knew(過去式)是與現在相反的第二類條件句,時態不對稱。

newQuiz.stem: It's high time we ___ home; it's almost midnight.
newQuiz.explanation: It's (high) time + 主詞 + 過去式,表『早該做某事卻還沒做』,故 went(假設語氣過去式)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ It's high time (that) 子句用過去式表現在該做之事(虛擬),不是真的過去;go(原形)或 will go(未來)都不符此固定句型。

newQuiz.stem: The new bridge ___ for two years, and engineers say it won't open until next spring.
newQuiz.explanation: 橋是被建造(被動),且『持續兩年仍在進行』,用現在完成進行被動 has been being built。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 橋無法自己建造,須用被動;又因動作持續且未完成(尚未開通),用現在完成進行被動 has been being built;has been built(完成被動)會暗示已蓋好。

newQuiz.stem: Every time I visit Grandma, she ___ me a bowl of hot soup before I even sit down.
newQuiz.explanation: Every time 引導反覆發生的習慣性事件,主句用現在簡單式 brings。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Every time / Whenever 表反覆習慣,主句用現在簡單式 brings;雖句中有 before 子句,但全句描述每次都發生的常態,非單一進行中的動作。

newQuiz.stem: She speaks as if she ___ the whole story, but actually she knows nothing about it.
newQuiz.explanation: as if + 與現在事實相反,用過去式 knew(假設語氣),故 knew。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ as if/as though 表與現在事實相反時,子句用過去式 knew(虛擬);句尾 actually she knows nothing 證實是相反的假設,不可用 knows。

newQuiz.stem: Look at the chart: the company's sales ___ steadily since 2020 and reached a record high last month.
newQuiz.explanation: since 2020 表從過去持續到現在的趨勢,圖表數據累積至今,用現在完成式 have risen(sales 為複數)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ since + 過去起點延續到現在用現在完成 have risen;reached last month 只是過程中的一點,不改變整體『自2020起至今』的現在完成框架;had risen(過去完成)缺過去基準點。

newQuiz.stem: I would rather you ___ so loudly while everyone else is trying to concentrate.
newQuiz.explanation: would rather + 主詞 + 過去式,表對現在或未來的期望(虛擬),故 didn't talk。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ would rather (that) + 另一主詞時,子句用過去式 didn't talk 表現在虛擬,非過去事實;don't talk(原形/現在式)不符此句型結構。

newQuiz.stem: By the end of this year, I ___ at this company for a decade.
newQuiz.explanation: By the end of this year(未來時點)+『持續一段時間 for a decade』強調延續,用未來完成進行式 will have been working。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 『到未來某時點為止已持續多久』用未來完成進行 will have been working,強調持續過程;will have worked(未來完成)只表完成不強調延續,for a decade 是線索。

newQuiz.stem: The witness insisted that the suspect ___ the building before midnight, hours before the fire started.
newQuiz.explanation: 主句 insisted(過去),且『離開』比『火災發生』更早,用過去完成式 had left。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 兩過去事件有先後,較早者(離開)用過去完成 had left;主句 insisted 為過去,間接陳述中更早動作降為過去完成,不是過去簡單 left。

newQuiz.stem: Neither the players nor the coach ___ satisfied with the referee's final decision yesterday.
newQuiz.explanation: Neither A nor B 動詞與最近的主詞 the coach(單數)一致,且 yesterday 為過去,故 was。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Neither...nor 採『就近原則』,動詞配最近的 the coach(單數)用 was;別被前面複數 players 誤導用 were;yesterday 排除現在完成 have been。

newQuiz.stem: When you ___ this recording, I will already be on a plane heading to London.
newQuiz.explanation: When 引導的時間副詞子句中,表未來的動作用現在簡單式代替未來式,故 hear;主句才用未來。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 時間連接詞 when 引導的子句即使指未來也用現在簡單式 hear,不可用 will;主句 I will already be 才表未來,別把 will 放進子句。

newQuiz.stem: The earth ___ around the sun, a fact that ancient sailors used to rely on at sea.
newQuiz.explanation: 天體運行為不變的科學真理,恆用現在簡單式 moves;後半 used to 不影響主句的真理時態。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 不變真理(地球繞太陽)永遠用現在簡單式 moves,即使句中提到過去(ancient sailors used to);is moving(進行式)不適用於普遍恆常事實。

newQuiz.stem: Five years ___ a long time to wait, but the result finally proved worth it.
newQuiz.explanation: 表時間/金額/距離的複數名詞當『一個整體單位』時視為單數,動詞用 is。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Five years 在此指『五年這段時間』作單一整體,動詞用單數 is;雖形式為複數,但作量度單位時不用 are;proved 為過去不影響主句此處的判斷句結構。

newQuiz.stem: Not until she got home ___ that she had left her umbrella on the train.
newQuiz.explanation: Not until 置句首,主句須倒裝;『回到家才意識到』為過去,故倒裝助動詞用 did she realize。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Not until 置句首時主句倒裝(did + 主詞 + 原形),時態看『回到家』那一刻為過去簡單,故 did she realize;不可用未倒裝的 she realized,had left 已交代更早動作。

newQuiz.stem: This is one of the best novels that ___ ever been written about wartime friendship.
newQuiz.explanation: one of the + 複數名詞 + that 子句,關係子句動詞與複數先行詞 novels 一致,用現在完成 have been written 的助動詞 have。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 『one of the + 複數N + that』的關係子句動詞配複數 novels 用 have,非配 one 用 has;『至今寫過』用現在完成,故 have been。

newQuiz.stem: While the committee ___ the proposal, a fire alarm went off and everyone rushed out.
newQuiz.explanation: went off(突發短動作)發生時,委員會『正在』討論(背景持續動作),用過去進行式 was discussing(committee 視為單數整體)。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ While + 過去進行作背景,被突發的 went off 打斷;committee 此處當整體單數配 was;discussed(過去簡單)無法表『正在進行時被打斷』。

newQuiz.stem: By the time the next bus comes, we ___ here for nearly forty minutes.
newQuiz.explanation: By the time + 現在式(comes 表未來)+ 強調持續時間 for nearly forty minutes,主句用未來完成進行式 will have been waiting。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ By the time 子句用現在式 comes 代未來;主句『到那時已持續等多久』用未來完成進行 will have been waiting;have waited(現在完成)無法表未來時點前的持續。

newQuiz.stem: The manager required that every report ___ submitted before the Friday deadline.
newQuiz.explanation: require / suggest / demand / insist 等要求類動詞後的 that 子句用『(should) + 原形』的假設語氣,故 be submitted。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ require that 子句用假設語氣原形動詞 be(should 省略),不隨主句變過去;is/was/will be 都違反此要求類動詞的虛擬規則。

newQuiz.stem: Look at this graph — by 2050, the world's population ___ around ten billion, experts predict.
newQuiz.explanation: by 2050 為未來時點,搭配 predict 對未來的單純預測結果,用未來式 will reach。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 此處強調『達到某數值』的單一未來預測,用 will reach;雖有 by 2050,但句意是『將達到』而非『在那之前已完成』,故非未來完成 will have reached;reaches(簡單式)不表此單一未來預測。
